zh.Anta, Vila Real, Portugal: 葡萄牙比拉 雷亞爾安踏
zh.lifeSummary: 當Theresa Soares de Maia於1080年出生在葡萄牙布拉甘薩時，她的父親Dom Soeiro Mendes da Maya o Bom31歲，母親Gontrode Moniz41歲。她和Fernão Mendes de Bragança至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世在葡萄牙波爾圖邁亞。

zh-hans.Anta, Vila Real, Portugal: 葡萄牙比拉 雷亞爾安踏
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Theresa Soares de Maia于1080年出生在葡萄牙布拉甘薩时，她的父亲Dom Soeiro Mendes da Maya o Bom31岁，母亲Gontrode Moniz41岁。她和Fernão Mendes de Bragança至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世在葡萄牙波爾圖邁亞。

nameMeanings.name: Soares
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Luis, Francisco, Luiz, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Pedro, Joaquin, Sergio.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Anabela, Henrique, Vasco, Agostinho, Duarte, Goncalo, Marcio, Serafim, Seraphine.
Portuguese: patronymic from the medieval personal name Sueiro, derived from Latin suarius ‘swineherd’ (see Spanish Suero ).
Spanish: northwestern variant of Suárez (see Suarez ), a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Suero
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Manuel, Fernando, Ramon, Ana, Jesus, Jorge, Julio, Luis, Orlando, Rafael.
Spanish: from the medieval personal name Suero, from Latin Suarius, from suarius ‘swineherd’, a typical nomen humilitatis (‘name as a sign of humility’) of the early Christian times.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Julio, Alberto, Carlos, Hermilio, Jorge, Jose, Luis, Raul, Ronaldo, Ana, Armando.  Italian Antonio, Filippo, Giusto, Luciano.
Basque: habitational name from Maia (official Basque name: Amaiur; in Castilian: Maya) in the Baztan/Baztán valley in Navarre. Compare   Maya  .
Portuguese: habitational name from any of several places called Maia, especially one in Porto.

variants.name: Maya
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Carlos, Jaime, Juan, Luis, Miguel, Enrique, Jesus, Jorge, Manuel, Mario.
Basque: Castilianized form of   Maia   1.
Catalan: variant of Maià (see Maia 3).

nameMeanings.name: Theresa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of problematic origin. The name seems to have been first used in Spain and Portugal, and, according to tradition, was the name of the wife of St Paulinus of Nola, who spent most of his life in Spain; she was said to have originated (and to have derived her name) from the Greek island of Thēra. However, this story is neither factually nor etymologically confirmed.

variants.name: Teresa
meanings: form of   Theresa .  In the English-speaking world the name is often chosen in this spelling by Roman Catholics, with particular reference to the Spanish saint, Teresa of Ávila (  Teresa Cepeda de Ahumada ,  1515–82 ).

variants.name: Treeza
meanings: Modern contracted spelling of   Theresa   or Anglicization of Irish Treasa .

variants.name: Teresia
meanings: form of   Theresa .  In the English-speaking world the name is often chosen in this spelling by Roman Catholics, with particular reference to the Spanish saint, Teresa of Ávila (  Teresa Cepeda de Ahumada ,  1515–82 ).

variants.name: Theresia
meanings: Of problematic origin. The name seems to have been first used in Spain and Portugal, and, according to tradition, was the name of the wife of St Paulinus of Nola, who spent most of his life in Spain; she was said to have originated (and to have derived her name) from the Greek island of Thēra. However, this story is neither factually nor etymologically confirmed.

variants.name: Terese
meanings: Of problematic origin. The name seems to have been first used in Spain and Portugal, and, according to tradition, was the name of the wife of St Paulinus of Nola, who spent most of his life in Spain; she was said to have originated (and to have derived her name) from the Greek island of Thēra. However, this story is neither factually nor etymologically confirmed.

variants.name: Therese
meanings: From Spanish. See Theresa .

historicEvents.description: Afonso inherits the County of Portugal, a province of Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Theresa Soares de Maia was born in 1080, in Bragança, Portugal, her father, Dom Soeiro Mendes da Maya o Bom, was 31 and her mother, Gontrode Moniz, was 41. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Fernão Mendes de Bragança. She died in Maia, Porto, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theresa Soares de Maia est née en 1080, à Bragança, Portugal, son père, Dom Soeiro Mendes da Maya o Bom, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Gontrode Moniz, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Fernão Mendes de Bragança. Elle est décédée à Maia, Porto, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Theresa Soares de Maia 1080 in Bragança, Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dom Soeiro Mendes da Maya o Bom 31 und ihre Mutter Gontrode Moniz 41. Sie hatte mit Fernão Mendes de Bragança mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Maia, Porto, Portugal.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theresa Soares de Maia è nata il nel 1080 nel Bragança, Portogallo, sua padre, Dom Soeiro Mendes da Maya o Bom, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Gontrode Moniz, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Fernão Mendes de Bragança. Morì nel Maia, Porto, Portogallo.

ja.Anta, Vila Real, Portugal: ポルトガルヴィラ レアルアンタ
ja.Bragança, Portugal: ポルトガルブラガンcア
ja.Maia, Porto, Portugal: ポルトガルポルトーメイア
ja.lifeSummary: Theresa Soares de Maiaが1080年にポルトガルブラガンcアで生まれた時，父Dom Soeiro Mendes da Maya o Bomは31歳，母Gontrode Monizは41歳であった。彼女はFernão Mendes de Bragançaとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女はポルトガルポルトーメイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Theresa Soares de Maia(이)가 1080년 포르투갈 브라건c아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dom Soeiro Mendes da Maya o Bom(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gontrode Moniz(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Fernão Mendes de Bragança(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 포르투갈 포토 메이아에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theresa Soares de Maia nasceu em 1080, em Bragança, Portugal, seu pai, Dom Soeiro Mendes da Maya o Bom, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Gontrode Moniz, tinha 41 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Fernão Mendes de Bragança. Ela faleceu em Maia, Porto, Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theresa Soares de Maia родилась в 1080 г. в местности браганcа, Португалия, её отцу по имени Dom Soeiro Mendes da Maya o Bom было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Gontrode Moniz, 41. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Fernão Mendes de Bragança. Она умерла в местности меиа, порто, Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theresa Soares de Maia nació en 1080, en Bragança, Portugal, su papá, Dom Soeiro Mendes da Maya o Bom, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Gontrode Moniz, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Fernão Mendes de Bragança. Murió en Maia, Oporto, Portugal.
